original: You can’t seem to get a hold of the stimbooster at the moment!
You are about to pull out a stimbooster, but "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+" wouldn’t be able to make use of it!
Using the stimbooster without need would be pretty wasteful....

You flip the protective cap off the end of the hypospray and settle it quickly against your arm. A quick thumb of the button and the microsurgeons surge into your bloodstream near instantaneously, a distinct feeling of power coursing through your veins as they spread throughout your body.

You pull out a stimbooster and toss it to "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+". They quickly pop off the cap and press the business end to their body. In mere seconds "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+" look far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from their frame.

You pull out a stimbooster and toss it to "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+". "+e.mfn("He","She","It")+" quickly pops off the cap and presses the business end to "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" body. In mere seconds "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+" looks far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" frame.

(inCombat()?h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1):t.capitalA+t.short)+" pulls out a stimbooster and jabs it into their own body. In mere seconds they look far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from their frame.

(inCombat()?h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1):t.capitalA+t.short)+" pulls out a stimbooster and jabs it into "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" own arm. In mere seconds "+e.mfn("he","she","it")+" looks far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" frame.

(inCombat()?h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1):t.capitalA+t.short)+" pulls out a stimbooster and jabs it against "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+". In mere seconds they look far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from their frame.

(inCombat()?h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1):t.capitalA+t.short)+" pulls out a stimbooster and jabs it against "+(inCombat()?e.getCombatName():e.a+e.short)+"’s arm. In mere seconds "+e.mfn("he","she","it")+" looks far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" frame.
